heading: Conduct involving trade or commerce with foreign nations
label: 6a Conduct involving trade or commerce with foreign nations
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 7 of , , related to suits by persons injured by acts in violation of sections 1 to 7 of this title and was classified as a note under , prior to repeal by , , effective six months after .act July 2, 1890, ch. 64726 Stat. 210section 15 of this titleact July 7, 1955, ch. 283, § 369 Stat. 283July 7, 1955

children.label: A
children.text: on trade or commerce which is not trade or commerce with foreign nations, or on import trade or import commerce with foreign nations; or

children.label: B
children.text: on export trade or export commerce with foreign nations, of a person engaged in such trade or commerce in the United States; and
such effect gives rise to a claim under the provisions of sections 1 to 7 of this title, other than this section.
